Hero.title: Your driver in Bern
Hero.subtitle: Personal driving service for Bern and airport transfers to Zurich – reliable, friendly, and easy to book online.

Services.cityDescription: Available on weekends at an hourly rate – flexible for trips, errands, or appointments.
Services.airportDescription: Available all week, rides from 5pm, at a fixed price – relax on your way to the gate or back home.

Trust.title: Why Dein Fahrer?
Trust.licensedText: Commercial passenger transport with a valid permit.
Trust.vehicleText: 7 seats, and can be converted into a van with seats removed on request.
Trust.priceText: Fixed price for airport transfers, fair hourly rate in the city – no hidden costs.

Account.noBookings: You don't have any bookings yet. Book your first ride now.

Booking.citySubtitle: Bern City & surroundings — Saturdays and Sundays only, hourly rate.
Booking.airportSubtitle: Bern ↔ Zurich Airport — all week, rides from 5pm, at a fixed price.
Booking.cargoMode: Need extra cargo space (seats removed, van mode)
Booking.priceHint: Final price is calculated at booking.
Booking.loginRequired: Please log in to book a ride.
Booking.leadTimeHint: Book at least 24 hours in advance.
Booking.weekendOnlyHint: Only bookable on Saturdays and Sundays.

BookingConfirmation.title: Booking received!
BookingConfirmation.subtitle: Your request is in. Online payment is coming soon — we'll be in touch.
